name: Extract Monetary Values
description: Extract all monetary amounts with their currency codes from raw text using a Bedrock LLM. Handles formats like $1,234.56, USD 100, 50 EUR, ₹10,000, etc.
author: system

usage_examples.raw_text: The deal was worth $1.5 million. Additional fees of EUR 250,000 apply.
Revenue of ₹10,00,000 and costs of USD 5,000.
